Life at Goodfood

At Goodfood, we make good things happen. Whether you work in our operations or corporate teams, we will empower you to think big, build something innovative, and witness the impact of your contributions. We want you to learn and grow along with us in our journey to being in every kitchen in Canada.

Why join us?

In addition to a great work culture, we also offer the following perks:

Competitive salary and bonus programs
Employee Stock Purchase Plan
Competitive group insurance
Annual fitness and Goodfood credits
Flexibile working options
Personal days and more!
Our current openings

Our founders

Passionate about both food and technology from a young age, Jonathan and Neil have put their finance backgrounds to use in a new venture aiming to democratize meal planning and grocery delivery. Born out of a goal to get more people preparing delicious and healthy meals at home, today Goodfood is a team of 500+ people delivering delicious meals weekly across Canada.

Jonathan Ferrari

Neil Cuggy

Our story

Learn how we went from a tiny Montreal apartment to becoming the #1 Canadian meal kit.
